stemHtml: The controller instructs you to "STOP SQUAWK CHARLIE, WRONG INDICATION". This means that the controller…

options.a: is informing you that he/she can only determine your bearing within 10 degrees.
options.b: wants you to turn off the altitude reporting function on your transponder.
options.c: wants you to switch off your transponder completely.
options.d: has an incorrect position indication for your aircraft on his/her primary radar.
